stories.title: Follow along in ESPN's Draftcast: Analysis for every pick
stories.summary: Get pick by pick results from each round of the 2026 NFL Draft with Draftcast on ESPN

stories.title: McCoy falls to Raiders at No. 101, says knee fine
stories.summary: Jermod McCoy says his knee feels good, adding it's up to the Raiders on whether he undergoes another surgery after missing all of 2025 with a torn ACL.

stories.title: NBA: Smart committed lane violation on key FT
stories.summary: Marcus Smart should have been called for a lane violation on the final of his three free throws toward the end of regulation in the Lakers' Game 3 win.

stories.title: Haven, No. 1 overall QB in '27, chooses Alabama
stories.summary: Alabama secured the No. 1 overall quarterback in the Class of 2027, gaining a commitment from five-star passer Elijah Haven, a 6-foot-5, 220-pound prospect from Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

stories.title: Magic hold off Pistons' late push, grab 2-1 lead
stories.summary: Paolo Banchero and Desmond Bane each scored 25 points, and the Orlando Magic watched a 17-point fourth-quarter lead evaporate before rallying to defeat the Detroit Pistons 113-105 Saturday, taking a 2-1 lead in their Eastern Conference first-round series.
